content.text:
{For I know the plans I have for you, declares the Lord, plans for welfare and not for evil, to give you a future and a hope.}{Jeremiah 29:11}
 {Life is a school of probability.}{— Walter Bagehot}
A **Markov chain** models systems that evolve probabilistically.

content.title: Markov Chain
content.content:
A **Markov chain** is a sequence of states 
where the probability of each state depends only on the previous 
state (memoryless property). The **transition matrix** $P$ has 
$p_{ij}$ = probability of going from state $j$ to state $i$.

content.text:
Transition matrices are **stochastic**: nonnegative entries with 
columns summing to 1.

content.title: Weather model
content.problem:
Sunny tomorrow: 80\% if sunny today, 40\% if rainy.
\[
P = \begin{bmatrix} 0.8 & 0.4 \\ 0.2 & 0.6 \end{bmatrix}
\]
If $\vect{x}_0 = \begin{bmatrix} 1 \\ 0 \end{bmatrix}$ (sunny today), 
then $\vect{x}_n = P^n\vect{x}_0$.

content.title: Perron-Frobenius
content.content:
A positive stochastic matrix has a unique steady-state, and 
$P^n\vect{x} \to \vect{q}$ as $n \to \infty$.
content.label: Theorem

marginNotes.text:
The heart of man plans his way, but 
the Lord establishes his steps.
